samples.text: A fire makes nearby objects freeze instantly. Is this expected based on common sense?
Flames cause nearby items to freeze immediately. Does this match everyday common sense?
A blaze freezes surrounding objects at once. Is this expected based on common sense?
Fire emits heat, which warms objects. It does not freeze them. Is the described situation expected based on common sense?
A fire makes nearby objects freeze instantly. The meeting started at noon. Is this expected based on common sense?
